title: 9. **meOS B2B Licensing**
summary:
What it is: License meOS iOS app technology to other businesses for their internal use or as part of their product offerings.
Revenue model: Royalty-based licensing fees from partner companies.
Time to first dollar: 4-6 weeks, including outreach and negotiation phases.
First action: Identify potential B2B partners that could benefit from integrating meOS technology into their solutions.
Risk/blocker: Finding suitable partners and negotiating favorable licensing terms.
